StructurePhase.Reference: Leineweber A., Jacobs H., J. Alloys Compd., v278 pL10 (1998)
StructurePhase.Comment: ANX: NO. Color: gray silver. LPF Collection Code: 1300698. Sample Preparation: STARTING MATERIALS:La,Al. Compound Preparation: heated at 1223 K for 2 d, cooled over 1 d. CRUCIBLE: alumina. ATMOSPHERE: nitrogen. Article Title: Preparation of single crystals of LaAl and X-ray structure determination. Wyckoff Sequence: g c a. Unit Cell Data Source: Single Crystal.
